title: Advanced Cooking Recipes
description: This lesson focuses on advanced recipes that utilize the techniques learned in previous lessons. Users will create dishes that require multi-step processes and advanced skills.

steps.instruction: Prepare ingredients for a gourmet dish, including mise en place.
Follow a complex recipe that incorporates sous-vide cooking and fermentation techniques.
Plate the dish beautifully, focusing on presentation skills.
Taste and adjust flavors, using techniques learned in previous lessons.
